weekly_summary: Over the past four days, our security landscape has been characterized by a diverse range of threats, with 12 total findings and 11 unique CVEs tracked. The most frequently seen vulnerabilities, each occurring once, include CVE-2025-54068, CVE-2025-43520, and others, spanning multiple security domains such as AI/ML threats, containers, and web servers. The majority of these vulnerabilities were observed on March 21, 2026, which was the most active day, indicating a recent surge in malicious activity across various domains, including OS/kernel, crypto libraries, and supply chain threats.
